claims.summary: Comfort gate, foothold, and fluctuation must remain distinguishable so a low gate does not erase stable footing.
claims.rationale: Existing resonance stability tests verify the low-gate/stable-foothold state and multi-modal habitability score.

claims.summary: Cohesion fallback should preserve shape-holding evidence when explicit cohesion is missing.
claims.rationale: Existing cohesion tests cover explicit metric use, weighted fallback, and defaulting missing fluidity to the midpoint.

claims.summary: A single closure reason can obscure concurrent pressure, mode-packing, and temporal-persistence closure causes.
claims.rationale: Added read-only `gate_closure_reasons` to preserve all active closure causes while leaving the primary field intact.
